ST-LINK SN  : 066CFF323535474B43015520
ST-LINK FW  : V2J47M34
Board       : NUCLEO-F103RB
Voltage     : 3.25V
SWD freq    : 4000 KHz
Connect mode: Normal
Reset mode  : Software reset
Device ID   : 0x410
Revision ID : Rev X
Device name : STM32F101/F102/F103 Medium-density
NVM size  : 128 KBytes
Device type : MCU
Device CPU  : Cortex-M3
BL Version  : --
